name: Modern University for Business and Science

admissions_process.summary: Graduate applicants are directed through the admission landing page, the graduate-majors flow, and the official forms/application channels. Current graduate admission requirements were not fully extractable from the live site in this pass, so the official catalogue PDFs remain the clearest source for the graduate application checklist.
steps: Review the admission landing page and graduate majors page.
Use the official MUBS application or info-request flow for the chosen graduate option.
Prepare the supporting documents listed in the official catalogue PDFs.
Complete any additional review or testing that MUBS requests for the selected graduate path.

required_documents.summary: The official catalogue PDFs list the graduate application checklist. The current source set confirms the standard supporting documents even though the live admissions page could not be fully extracted.
items: Certified copies of official certificates or diplomas

language_requirements.summary: The official catalogue PDFs state graduate English thresholds, but the current admissions page was not fully extractable during discovery. The legacy catalogue values are retained here as the official language reference recovered in this pass.
notes: Treat these values as the official catalogue references recovered in this pass, not as a newly verified current-page rewrite.

tuition_model.summary: No stable numeric graduate tuition rate was recovered from the current official MUBS pages in this pass. The general tuition page returned verification/loader behavior, and the Cardiff tuition page states that graduate fees are available upon request.
notes: No program-level tuition was mapped into `programs.json`.
Keep tuition null at program level until a current official fee schedule is recovered.

application_fee.notes: The reviewed official pages confirm the admissions and forms flow, but the accessible source set did not expose a stable graduate application fee amount.

registration_fee.notes: The tuition and Cardiff tuition pages did not expose a stable graduate registration fee amount in this pass.

fee_structure.notes: The official source set confirms fee-related pages and forms, but not stable numeric fee amounts for the current graduate inventory.

payment_methods.summary: The official source set confirms that fee information is handled through MUBS tuition and info-request forms, but it does not expose a stable bank/cash/installment payment matrix in this pass.
items: Use the official MUBS tuition and info-request forms for fee inquiries
Cardiff graduate fees are available upon request through MUBS

payment_plans.summary: No formal installment schedule was recovered from the official pages reviewed in this pass. The source set only confirms that Cardiff graduate fees are available upon request.
items: No published graduate installment schedule was recovered
Cardiff graduate fees are available upon request

scholarships.summary: MUBS publishes a financial-aid page that explicitly references scholarships, academic merits, and athletic scholarships.

financial_aid.summary: The financial-aid page states that aid is intended to help students and families cover higher-education expenses and includes need-based grants.
items: Financial aid for qualifying students and families

academic_calendar.summary: The academic calendar page is present in the official navigation, and the homepage previews upcoming academic dates, but the current calendar page could not be fully extracted in this pass.
items: Academic calendar page discovered in navigation

graduate_regulations.summary: The rules-and-regulations page is published on the official site, but the accessible source set did not expose its full text. The official catalogue PDFs remain the clearest recovered graduate-regulations reference for this pass.
items: Graduate rules and regulations page exists on the official site
Catalogue PDFs remain the recovered graduate-regulations reference

international_students.summary: No dedicated graduate international-student policy page was recovered in this pass. The official site navigation includes International Affairs, and the admissions/forms flow supports applicant handling through official MUBS channels.
items: International Affairs appears in the official site navigation
Graduate applicant handling is routed through official MUBS admissions and forms pages
No separate graduate international-student policy text was recovered

accreditation.summary: The Computer Science Department page explicitly states MEHE accreditation for the BCS and MCS. No broader university-wide graduate accreditation statement was recovered in the reviewed source set.
items: MEHE accreditation for the BCS and MCS
